description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow surrounded by a low perimeter wall and featuring a spacious yard. The structure is predominantly white and beige, with large rectangular windows and flat roofs, some of which serve as terraces or balconies. The property includes a swimming pool with a curved shape, a poolside seating area shaded by umbrellas, and several landscaped trees and shrubs. There is a driveway with a car parked under a covered carport, and the backyard is designed for leisure with outdoor furniture and a barbecue area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, a swimming pool, and landscaped outdoor areas, enclosed by a low wall. The design features clean lines, open terraces, and a mix of leisure and functional spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front facade with the main entrance, carport, and a large tree near the driveway.
description_view_1: The swimming pool, poolside seating, and much of the backyard landscaping are prominent from this angle.
description_view_2: The rear of the bungalow is visible, showing the pool, shaded seating, and a mix of trees and shrubs along the boundary.
description_view_3: The driveway, carport, and a large tree dominate this side, with the main entrance and front yard visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
